milestone.title: V21
milestone.goal: a reader of the ADD book can trace the method's intellectual lineage — recursive self-improvement, spec-driven development, agentic + tests-first research — and see ADD as the human-gated, evidence-trusted instance of 'closing the loop', grounded in verified, citable sources woven through the book

references-appendix.title: Curated annotated references appendix + spec-kit↔ADD phase table

reopens.reason: cross-task aptness finding from inline-citations (a85b81a): ch.15 line 41 frames [Yuan et al. 2024] as a cautionary example ('judges its own reward drifts') but the paper's result is positive (self-rewarding improves). Reframe to the self-rewarding exemplar ADD diverges from, matching the 09 fix. Human-approved at the inline-citations gate 2026-06-08.

inline-citations.title: Weave inline citations into specify/process/loop chapters
